category_sources: source_facts.description says nkt is a TUI for interacting with a BibLaTeX database.
source_facts.homepage is the official SourceHut project page for nkt.
docs_sources: No separate official documentation URL was present in the input or found in official project metadata.
source_facts.homepage points to the official SourceHut project page, used as the best official documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is an official SourceHut source-control project URL and source_facts.repo is empty.
source_facts.source-archive is hosted under the same SourceHut project path.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a TUI for BibLaTeX databases.
source_facts.homepage identifies the official SourceHut project.
